data.acceptance: 1) The Scan model selector in Settings → Agents displays exactly five entries: 3.1-pro-preview, 3-flash-preview, 2.5-pro, 2.5-flash, and 2.5-flash-lite. 2) No other Gemini model options are present in this selector and none of the five required entries are missing. 3) Selecting and saving a model works exactly as before, with the only functional difference being the updated model names list.
